name: MapR5NamingsystemIdentifierTypeForR4
title: Cross-version ConceptMap for ValueSet R5-namingsystem-identifier-type-for-R4 from FHIR R5 to FHIR R4
description: This ConceptMap represents the cross-version mapping of concepts from ValueSet `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/namingsystem-identifier-type|5.0.0` for use in FHIR R4.

target.comment:
Using explicit mapping from `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/namingsystem-identifier-type|5.0.0` to `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/namingsystem-identifier-type|4.3.0` as Equivalent in `http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/xver/5.0/ConceptMap/R5-NamingsystemIdentifierType-R4B-NamingsystemIdentifierType` (`ConceptMap-R5-NamingsystemIdentifierType-R4B-NamingsystemIdentifierType.json`)
Using explicit mapping from `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/namingsystem-identifier-type|4.3.0` to `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/namingsystem-identifier-type|4.0.1` as Equivalent in `http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/xver/4.3/ConceptMap/R4B-NamingsystemIdentifierType-R4-NamingsystemIdentifierType` (`ConceptMap-R4B-NamingsystemIdentifierType-R4-NamingsystemIdentifierType.json`)
Applying explicit mapping from `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/namingsystem-identifier-type|5.0.0#oid` to `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/namingsystem-identifier-type|4.0.1#oid` as Equivalent in `ConceptMap-R5-NamingsystemIdentifierType-R4-NamingsystemIdentifierType.json`, which results in Equivalent.

Using explicit mapping from `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/namingsystem-identifier-type|5.0.0` to `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/namingsystem-identifier-type|4.3.0` as Equivalent in `http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/xver/5.0/ConceptMap/R5-NamingsystemIdentifierType-R4B-NamingsystemIdentifierType` (`ConceptMap-R5-NamingsystemIdentifierType-R4B-NamingsystemIdentifierType.json`)
Since source concept `other` is flagged as an 'escape-valve' code and the source value set contains more concepts than the target (6 vs. 4), the source is narrower than the target.
Using explicit mapping from `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/namingsystem-identifier-type|4.3.0` to `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/namingsystem-identifier-type|4.0.1` as Equivalent in `http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/xver/4.3/ConceptMap/R4B-NamingsystemIdentifierType-R4-NamingsystemIdentifierType` (`ConceptMap-R4B-NamingsystemIdentifierType-R4-NamingsystemIdentifierType.json`)
Since source concept `other` is flagged as an 'escape-valve' code and the source value set contains the same number of concepts as the target (4 vs. 4), we can assume equivalence.
Applying explicit mapping from `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/namingsystem-identifier-type|5.0.0#other` to `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/namingsystem-identifier-type|4.0.1#other` as Equivalent in `ConceptMap-R5-NamingsystemIdentifierType-R4-NamingsystemIdentifierType.json`, which results in SourceIsNarrowerThanTarget.
Value Set Relationship of RelatedTo applied to 'escape-valve' mapping.
